storyboard.content: I have an itchy, scaly rash on both my elbows and knees.
The skin in those areas is thickened and has a silvery scale on top.
The rash flares up when I am stressed.
The rash has been going on for about 2 months and has stayed the same — not getting better or worse.
The itching is annoying but manageable and is not stopping me from doing my daily activities.
I am a 35-year-old man. I had a very similar rash years ago that went away on its own.
Stress seems to make it worse. Both elbows and both knees are affected at the same time.
